plugins.name: Registry Broker
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to specialist AI agents via the HOL Registry, plan, find, summon, and recover sessions.

plugins.name: AgentOps
plugins.description: DevOps layer for coding agents with flow, feedback, and memory that compounds between sessions.

plugins.name: Brooks Lint
plugins.description: AI code reviews grounded in six classic engineering books — decay risk diagnostics with book citations, severity labels, and four analysis modes (PR review, architecture audit, tech debt, test quality).

plugins.name: Claude Code for Codex
plugins.description: Reverse of OpenAI's official Claude-hosted plugin: use Claude Code from Codex for reviews, rescue tasks, tracked background jobs, and hook-powered review gates.

plugins.name: Claude Code Harness
plugins.description: Harness blueprint skill for turning vague agent ideas into concrete designs for request assembly, control loops, memory, permissions, recovery, and extension planes.

plugins.name: Claude Code Skills
plugins.description: 223 production-ready skills, 23 agents, and 298 Python tools across 9 domains — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, and more.

plugins.name: Claude Octopus
plugins.description: Multi-LLM orchestration dispatching to 8 providers (Codex, Gemini, Copilot, Qwen, Perplexity, OpenRouter, Ollama, OpenCode) with Double Diamond workflows, adversarial review, and safety gates.

plugins.name: Codebase Recon
plugins.description: Analyze git history to understand a codebase before reading any code — auto-scales by repo size and cross-references hotspots with bug magnets to surface high-risk files, bus factor, and team momentum.

plugins.name: Codex Agenteam
plugins.description: Specialist AI agents (researcher, PM, architect, developer, QA, reviewer) orchestrated as a configurable team pipeline.

plugins.name: Codex Multi Auth
plugins.description: Multi-account OAuth manager for the official Codex CLI with switching, health checks, and recovery tools.

plugins.name: Codex Reviewer
plugins.description: Second-pass review of Claude-driven plans and implementations.

plugins.name: HOTL Plugin
plugins.description: Human-on-the-Loop AI coding workflow plugin for Codex, Claude Code, and Cline with structured planning, review, and verification guardrails.

plugins.name: Project Autopilot
plugins.description: Turn an idea into a structured project workflow with planning, execution, verification, and handoff.

plugins.name: Session Orchestrator
plugins.description: Session orchestration for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor IDE — structured planning, wave-based execution, VCS integration (GitLab + GitHub), quality gates, and clean session close-out with issue tracking.

plugins.name: tailtest
plugins.description: Hook-powered test generation -- detects files changed during an agent turn and instructs Codex to write and run tests automatically. Zero config, 8 languages.

plugins.name: Tartiner Labs
plugins.description: Agent skills for git workflows, GitHub automation, security audits, code refactoring, and project tooling.

plugins.name: Tool Advisor
plugins.description: Read-only meta-skill that scans your MCP servers, skills, plugins, and CLI tools, then suggests up to three ranked approaches (Methodical / Fast / Deep) with a copy-paste Quick Action table.

plugins.name: VibePortrait
plugins.description: Developer personality portrait generator — analyzes AI conversation history to produce MBTI type (16 color themes), capability radar, developer rating, 3-dimension famous match, and a persona skill that lets any AI "think like you".

plugins.name: Agent Message Queue
plugins.description: File-based inter-agent messaging with co-op mode, cross-project federation, and orchestrator integrations.

plugins.name: Apple Productivity
plugins.description: Local Apple Calendar and Reminders tooling for macOS with Codex plugin adapters.

plugins.name: Bitbucket CLI
plugins.description: Manage Bitbucket repos, PRs, branches, issues, webhooks, and pipelines for Data Center and Cloud.

plugins.name: Call-E
plugins.description: Plan, run, and inspect Call-E phone call workflows from Codex through the calle CLI.

plugins.name: Chrome DevTools
plugins.description: One-click Codex plugin wrapper for chrome-devtools-mcp.

plugins.name: Codex Be Serious
plugins.description: Enforce formal, textbook-grade written register across all agent output.

plugins.name: Codex Mem
plugins.description: Automatically capture, compress, and inject session context back into future Codex sessions.

plugins.name: Codex Obsidian
plugins.description: Local Obsidian note and vault workflows through the official desktop `obsidian` CLI.

plugins.name: Codex SEO
plugins.description: Full-stack SEO audits, Google API workflows, backlinks analysis, reporting, and optional MCP extensions for Codex.

plugins.name: Context Pack
plugins.description: Generate compact first-pass repository briefings for coding agents before deeper exploration.

plugins.name: Flow Studio Power Automate
plugins.description: Debug, build, and operate Power Automate flows via FlowStudio MCP with action-level inputs and outputs.

plugins.name: Jenkins CLI
plugins.description: GitHub CLI-style interface for Jenkins controllers with jobs, pipelines, runs, logs, artifacts, credentials, and nodes.

plugins.name: Kachilu Browser
plugins.description: Anti-bot-aware browser automation for AI agents with MCP tools, CAPTCHA-aware workflows, and WSL2 Windows browser support.

plugins.name: KiCad Happy
plugins.description: KiCad EDA skills for schematic analysis, PCB layout review, component sourcing, BOM management, and manufacturing preparation.

plugins.name: Langfuse Observability
plugins.description: Query traces, debug exceptions, analyze sessions, and manage prompts via MCP tools.

plugins.name: Launch Fast
plugins.description: Official Launch Fast plugin adapter for rapid SaaS deployment.

plugins.name: Mobazha
plugins.description: Decentralized e-commerce skills — deploy self-hosted stores, import products from Shopify/Amazon, configure custom domains and Telegram bots, set up Tor privacy, and manage your store via MCP.

plugins.name: MorningAI
plugins.description: AI news tracking skill that monitors 80+ entities across 6 sources (Reddit, HN, GitHub, Hugging Face, arXiv, X) and generates scored daily reports with infographics and message digests.

plugins.name: OC ChatGPT Multi Auth
plugins.description: Codex setup skill and OpenCode plugin for ChatGPT Plus/Pro OAuth, GPT-5/Codex presets, and multi-account failover.

plugins.name: OpenProject
plugins.description: Team collaboration via OpenProject integration.

plugins.name: OrgX
plugins.description: MCP access and initiative-aware skills for organizational workflows.

plugins.name: PANews Agent Toolkit
plugins.description: Crypto and blockchain news discovery, authenticated creator publishing workflows, and page-to-Markdown reading.

plugins.name: PapersFlow
plugins.description: Paper discovery, citation verification, graph exploration, and DeepScan analysis.

plugins.name: prompt-to-asset
plugins.description: Route image-generation prompts to 30+ models (DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, Flux, Midjourney, and more) through a single MCP interface. Install: `npm install -g prompt-to-asset`.

plugins.name: Remotion Plugin
plugins.description: Build parameterized Remotion videos in Codex with the official Remotion docs MCP, composition scaffolding, and a data-driven launch-video workflow.

plugins.name: ru-text
plugins.description: Russian text quality — ~1,040 rules for typography, info-style, editorial, UX writing, and business correspondence.

plugins.name: Rust Reverse Engineering
plugins.description: Reverse engineer Rust binaries and libraries: triage targets, demangle symbols, recover crate namespaces, and map panic, unwind, async, and FFI paths.

plugins.name: sitemd
plugins.description: Build websites from Markdown via MCP — 22 tools for creating pages, generating content, validating, running SEO audits, configuring settings, and deploying static sites to Cloudflare Pages.

plugins.name: Synta MCP
plugins.description: Build, edit, validate, and self-heal n8n workflows with Synta MCP tools and Codex-ready workflow guidance.

plugins.name: Task Scheduler
plugins.description: OpenAI Codex plugin and local MCP server for turning task lists into realistic schedules with blocked dates, capacity overrides, overflow tracking, and markdown planning output.

plugins.name: TokRepo Search
plugins.description: Search and install AI assets from TokRepo with a bundled skill and MCP server for Codex.

plugins.name: unslop
plugins.description: Strip AI writing patterns from text output — removes filler phrases, hedging language, and generic constructs to produce cleaner written content. Install: `npm install -g unslop`.

plugins.name: Upwork Autopilot
plugins.description: Controlled Upwork job search, qualification, and proposal submission sessions through a dedicated Chrome profile.

plugins.name: Yandex Direct
plugins.description: GitHub-ready Codex plugin bundle for Yandex Direct, Wordstat, Metrika, and Roistat.
